process.label: How we work
process.title: 3 simple steps
process.subtitle: We treat every case individually, offering tailored solutions.

step1.title: Free consultation (approx. 15 min)
step1.desc: Tell us about your situation — our experts will assess your case and propose an optimal strategy.

step2.title: Document preparation
step2.desc: Signing the agreement, collecting and preparing all required documents.

step3.title: Positive decision
step3.desc: We represent you before the office until you receive the documents confirming your status.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to the questions we hear most often from our clients.

cost.q: How much does help with a residence card cost?
cost.a: The cost depends on the type and complexity of the case. A free consultation will allow us to quote your case precisely. Contact us and you'll receive a quote within 24 hours.

duration.q: How long does the residence card process take?
duration.a: The processing time depends on the individual case and the workload of the office. With properly prepared documentation and our experience, we can often shorten this time.

documents.q: What documents do I need to prepare?
documents.a: The list of documents depends on the type of permit. During a free consultation, we'll present you with the exact list — don't worry, we guide you step by step.

workWhileWaiting.q: Can I work in Poland while waiting for the decision?
workWhileWaiting.a: In most cases — yes. After submitting a complete application for a residence and work permit, you receive a stamp in your passport that allows you to work legally until the decision is issued.

worldwide.q: Do you help people from all over the world?
worldwide.a: Yes, we help citizens of all countries outside the European Union. We serve clients in Polish, English, Russian and Ukrainian.

rejected.q: What if my application is rejected?
rejected.a: We prepare appeals against negative decisions and urgency complaints in case of delays. 98% of our cases end with a positive decision.

cookies.title: Cookies and privacy
cookies.message: We use cookies essential for the client panel to function (session, language). No tracking, no ads. More in our privacy policy.
